Keeping the name as the 1-2-3 Keto System or the 1-2-3 Easy Keto System or

(02:03)

it’s actually very simple. “Craving transference theory is the idea that the best
thing to do when you’re craving something bad is to replace it with something
good. But then this only works when the “good” thing is something you
actually want. That way making a good decision becomes easy and feels like
